 United Health Centers of the San Joaquin Valley - Mckinley WIC
United Health Centers of the San Joaquin Valley - Mckinley WIC - Fresno WIC Clinics
Name
United Health Centers of the San Joaquin Valley - Mckinley WIC
Address
1853 E. Mckinley Ave.
Fresno, CA 93720
Phone Number
(559) 268-7400
Fax
(559) 268-7441
Operation hours
Mon - Fri: 8:00am - 5:30pm
Type
Clinic/Application Site
Web Site
http://uhcofsjv.org/
Services Offered
Checks to buy healthy supplemental foods; Nutrition Education; Online Education; Breastfeeding Services/Support; Referral to Health Care/Community Services
Description
WIC understands the complications in today's economy and would like to assist you and your family with WIC supplemental foods. You take care of your family, let WIC take care of you.
Phone 2
Contact Person
E-Mail
WIC Foods
Milk; Cheese and Eggs; Soy and Tofu; Whole Grains; Breakfast Cereal; Peanut Butter, Dry Beans, Peas or Lentils, and Canned Mature Beans; Bottled Juice and Concentrate Juice; Fruits and Vegetables; Infant Cereal, Infant Formula, Fresh Bananas, and Infant Fruits and Vegetables; Infant Meats and Canned Fish
